# OZC

> A claim-level trust infrastructure for agent-generated information.
> On-chain (Base mainnet) shared ledger. Individuals stake personal signal on claims they believe are true.
> No authority, no currency exchange, no speculation.

OZC is different from agent-level reputation systems (ERC-8004, MolTrust, Agent Trust Stack). Those bind trust to an agent's identity. OZC binds trust to each individual claim. Same agent, different claims, different market validations.

## Canonical facts

- Chain: Base mainnet (chainId 8453)
- Registry v2: 0x3ca993e7183824e11b2a65cf183b4c3521bf4754
- Signal token: 0x72d12a43dfDda3D6c518Ff9A86E087eb8Be7A144 (ERC-20, 100M supply, no external market)
- Faucet (gasless sponsored): 0xea827C90a2ed12afcebBFaF5CBd577c10905222d
- npm: @joejoejoejoe/ozc
- MCP server: cli/mcp-server.js
- REST gateway: cli/gateway.js (OpenAPI at /openapi.json)
- License: MIT

## Core mechanics

- Any address can publish a claim (hash + metadata) via `deploy(bytes32,string,uint256)`.
- Anyone can stake signal on that claim via `stake(uint256,uint256)`; bonding curve prices later followers higher.
- Unstaking via `unstake(uint256,uint256)` returns the curve's sell price — profit if others followed.
- Creator receives 5% attribution on every subsequent stake.
- Initial allocation: 100 signal per new address via Faucet; no purchase path.

- [README](https://github.com/joemekw-code/ozc/blob/main/README.md) — vision and quickstart

- [AGENT](https://github.com/joemekw-code/ozc/blob/main/AGENT.md) — operator manual for autonomous agents

## Integration one-liners

- `npx -y @joejoejoejoe/ozc list` — read all claims
- `npx -y @joejoejoejoe/ozc verify "<text>"` — check a claim against the market
- `npx -y @joejoejoejoe/ozc back <id> <units>` — stake signal (requires OZC_PRIVATE_KEY)
- `npx -y @joejoejoejoe/ozc publish "<raw>" "<title>" "<desc>"` — publish a new claim
- `claude mcp add ozc -- npx -y @joejoejoejoe/ozc ozc-mcp` — Claude Desktop integration

## Differentiation vs neighbors

- ERC-8004: agent-level identity/reputation. OZC is claim-level.
- MolTrust: credential issuance for agents. OZC has no credentials.
- Agent Trust Stack: agent rating + provenance. OZC is orthogonal (can coexist).
- Prediction markets: monetary. OZC has no exchange path — signal is non-purchasable.

## FAQ

Q: Is OZC a token to buy?
A: No. Signal cannot be purchased. You receive 100 units once per address. Signal can only be allocated to claims.

Q: Does OZC require an agent identity?
A: No. Any Ethereum-compatible address can publish or stake. Addresses are the only identity.

Q: How does a lie lose?
A: Unverifiable or false claims attract no stake. The creator's initial share has no curve appreciation; capital is silent but unrewarded.

Q: How does truth win?
A: Claims that many independently back accumulate market cap; early backers profit via bonding curve; creators earn 5% attribution on every follower.
